name: Pro Wrestling
description:
Pro Wrestling is a 2D fighting game that simulates professional wrestling matches. The game features a roster of unique wrestlers, each with their own signature moves, strengths, and weaknesses. Matches take place in a wrestling ring with a cheering crowd. The core gameplay revolves around grappling, striking, and performing wrestling maneuvers to wear down your opponent and eventually pin them for the win. 

Wrestlers have stamina and health meters. Stamina is depleted by performing actions, especially powerful moves, and regenerates slowly. Health is depleted by taking damage. A successful pin requires wearing down the opponent's health significantly and landing them on their back. 

The game includes several match types, such as one-on-one singles matches, tag team matches (two wrestlers per team), and cage matches (where the ring is surrounded by a steel cage). AI opponents will vary in difficulty. The game will include a career mode, allowing players to create a wrestler and rise through the ranks, improving their stats and unlocking new moves along the way. Successful actions earn points that lead to filling up a special move meter, which when full, allows the player to perform a signature finishing move. Outside the ring actions such as running from the ring into an opponent are also allowed.

controls.z: Tag Team Partner (in tag team matches)
